changes: Added @Injectable() and MicroserviceBase inheritance to the four FLOW-10 services.
Added FLOW_SCOPED and FLOW-10 portability annotations to the four FLOW-10 services.
Renamed private db and queue constructor fields to dbFabric and queueFabric so they do not collide with MicroserviceBase accessors.
Replaced local IFreedomConfigService clones in moderation and aggregation services with the canonical server/src/freedom/freedom-config.interface.ts contract.
Updated FLOW-10 tests to mock and assert canonical freedom.get(configKey) reads.
